title: dortmanna membranacea
intro: Dortmanna membranacea, also known as the membranous tortula, is a species of liverwort in the family Pottiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dortmanna membranacea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
